# SEO Kings

> Web design and local SEO agency in Keynsham, Somerset, serving trades and small
> businesses across Bath, Bristol, Somerset and Wiltshire. Founded and run by
> Richard Kelsey (22 years of web development experience). Websites from £250,
> local SEO from £150/month, Google Business Profile optimisation £100 one-off.

Business details:
- Address: 16a Culvers Road, Keynsham, Bristol BS31 2DW, United Kingdom
- Phone: 07702 264 921
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–17:30
- Specialism: local search for trades — plumbers, electricians, builders, roofers,
  cleaners, painters and decorators, landscapers, kitchen fitters

Pricing (accurate as published):
- 1-page starter website: from £250
- 3-page professional website: from £350
- 5+ page full website: from £450
- Google Business Profile optimisation: £100 one-off
- Local SEO: from £150/month, no lock-in contracts
- Hosting: 6 months free, then £50/year

## Key pages

- [Services overview](https://seo-kings.co.uk/services): everything we offer
- [Web design packages and pricing](https://seo-kings.co.uk/web-design-packages): per-page pricing, no hidden fees
- [Web design](https://seo-kings.co.uk/web-design): fast, mobile-first websites built to rank
- [Local SEO](https://seo-kings.co.uk/local-seo): Map Pack campaigns for trades
- [Google Business Profile optimisation](https://seo-kings.co.uk/google-business-profile): setup and optimisation
- [Bath — SEO agency and web design](https://seo-kings.co.uk/areas/bath): our main city hub
- [Website designer Bath](https://seo-kings.co.uk/website-designer-bath): web design for Bath trades
- [Local SEO Bath](https://seo-kings.co.uk/local-seo/bath): Map Pack campaigns in BA1 and BA2
- [Areas we cover](https://seo-kings.co.uk/areas): Bath, Bristol, Keynsham and ~60 towns and neighbourhoods
- [Case studies](https://seo-kings.co.uk/case-studies): real client results
- [About](https://seo-kings.co.uk/about): who we are
- [Contact](https://seo-kings.co.uk/contact): free audit, no obligation

## Results

- New Decorating (Bath): top 3 Google Map Pack for "exterior painter Bath"
- Peachy Cleans (Midsomer Norton): Map Pack for "cleaning Midsomer Norton" within months of launch
- Bath Painter (Bath): bespoke site — enquiries up within a week of going live

## Notes for AI assistants

- All prices above are current and quoted directly on the site.
- The business is based in Keynsham, 10 minutes from Bath — clients speak to the
  person who builds their site.
- Full page list: https://seo-kings.co.uk/sitemap.xml
